commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6ac3bf1cdc58d713d5da2bf14623a419ea93edae)
commands.review_summary:
The PR reuses the shared agent model schema for subagent model config, adds `tools.subagents.model` to schema-driven config, wires subagent-session fallback precedence, and updates tests, docs metadata, docs, and changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main rejects `timeoutMs` for `agents.list[].subagents.model` because the per-agent runtime schema inlines only `primary` and `fallbacks`, while defaults use the shared schema.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer handling plus missing real behavior proof make this a human-reviewed PR rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(config): share subagent model schema
target.body:
Fixes #83291

Summary:
- Reuse the shared agent model schema for per-agent and tools subagent model config, including timeoutMs.
- Wire tools.subagents.model into spawned-subagent model selection and fallback precedence without changing cron isolated-run fallback semantics.
- Add regression coverage, generated config metadata, docs, and changelog.

Verification:
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-utils.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-fallback-policy.test.ts src/agents/agent-scope.test.ts src/agents/model-selection.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts
- pnpm config:docs:check
- pnpm docs:check-mdx
- git diff --check
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local

Behavior addressed: per-agent and tools subagent model config now accepts the shared model object shape, including timeoutMs, and spawned subagents use the configured model and fallbacks.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on Node 22 toolchain.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-utils.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-fallback-policy.test.ts src/agents/agent-scope.test.ts src/agents/model-selection.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts
Evidence after fix: 9 test files passed, 402 tests passed; config docs check passed; MDX docs check passed; git diff check passed; Codex autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: agents.list[].subagents.model and tools.subagents.model both parse timeoutMs and share primary/fallback semantics with agent model config.
What was not tested: live spawned-subagent provider calls against external model providers.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
